summary: W974 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W973 endpoint closed-embedding, open-map, cokernel-top, and kernel-equality fields with the route-local W974 endpoint kernel-cokernel-top data provider. Product success remains false because the W974-style leaves are still explicit assumptions and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W974 replaces W973 endpoint kernel/cokernel-top fields by a route-local W974 endpoint data provider, but the W974-style leaves are still explicit assumptions.

The remaining W974 field surface includes bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint/adjunction data and unit mapping-cone model/closed-embedding/open-map/cokernel-top/kernel-equality/chosen-isomorphism fields.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract product-success evidence, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
